LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STANISLAV SHABALIN'S MOTION TO VACATE ENTRY OF DEFAULT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW LACK OF ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE LAWSUIT. THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES THAT DEFENDANT AVOIDED SERVICE OF THE LAWSUIT AND HIS ACTIONS CONSTITUTE INEXCUSABLE NEGLECT. PLAINTIFF WAS DILIGENT IN TRYING TO OBTAIN DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS. (CCP SECTION 473.5). JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Default Prove-Up Hearing.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default; Declarations Of Stanislav, Kerre A. Renn And Stella Stapletaon In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STANISLAV SHABALIN'S Motion to Vacate Entry of Default. Appearances: Cecily Gray, Esq., Attorney at Law, (510) 231-0700 appearing for Plaintiff for this hearing; Kerry A. Renn, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 346-7271 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is Denied. Defendant fails to show lack of actual notice of the lawsuit. The evidence establishes that defendant avoided service of the lawsuit and his actions constitute inexcusable neglect. Plaintiff was diligent in trying to obtain defendant's address. (CCP section 473.5). (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
